emails.subject: Re: TBI Gathering Agreement Form
emails.body: Re: TBI Gathering Agreement Form Steve, I think we are going to use Bill Ward with Pruitt-Gushee. I am trying to confirm this with Teresa. He worked on the original Crescendo transaction. I talked to Ken and his is okay with this also. Steve Pruett@ENRON 01/25/2001 09:34 AM
